Hilary Kay is thrilled to see an incredibly rare and valuable 18th-century painted silk dress which has been lying in a dressing-up box for over 50 years.

programme.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
programme.desc: The three finalists compete in three tough challenges set by Savile Row's Patrick Grant and sewing expert May Martin who must decide who will take the title of Britain's best amateur sewer. The first test is to follow a pattern for a man's shirt. The judges are looking for perfect top stitching with no pleats or puckers but the complicated challenge drives one sewer to tears. In the second challenge they have to show off their hand sewing skills, decorating an evening bag, and for the finale they are asked to create the most demanding garment so far - a stunning made-to-measure evening dress in a luxury fabric. The finalists are in for a surprise when they see who their models are.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: The property gurus revisit Dawn and Paul, who, back in 2015, were torn between renovating their Huddersfield home or relocating. Four years on, great changes have taken place.

programme.title: Location Location Location
programme.desc: Ellen and Michael want to live under the same roof, so it's up to Kirstie to find a flat that will get them out of their respective parents' houses. Phil's couple had a very modern approach to househunting.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Hardworking GP Zewlan and her electrician husband Tom (now stay-at-home dad to their two kids), want an architect-designed home in a great location on a shoestring budget. This was looking unlikely until they found an inexpensive block on a ridge above a freeway at Ocean Shores (near Byron). Now all they need is an architecture firm inventive enough to design them a stylish home for very little money. Their modest, forward-thinking philosophy is helpful as they naturally veer away from lavish floor plans and luxurious finishes in favour of the compact, simple, open, sustainable and economical. Working within a tenuous loan framework what they get, apart from stress, is quite fantastic.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Lauren and Jeremy's sprawling, run-down Gisborne home struggled to sell. With a risky $100,000 investment, Wendy and Dennis help transform the chaotic property.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Project manager Jackie employed Mr Winter to find her family a new, modern, open-plan home in bayside Melbourne. Her husband believes Neale is the answer to their issues and hopes his wife will change her mind.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: The RTS award winning series moves to Queen's Medical Centre in Nottingham, one of Europe's busiest A and E departments where stories of life, love and loss unfold daily.

programme.title: Gogglebox UK

programme.title: Gogglebox UK

programme.title: Gogglebox UK
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers watch Saltburn, Gladiators, First Dates: Be My Valentine, Trigger Point, This Morning, The Repair Shop, Bring the Drama, and BBC News on Joe Biden.

programme.desc: The Goggleboxers watch Wheel of Fortune, Trigger Point, Boarders, Michael McIntyre's Big Show, Love Is Blind, BBC News and The Pet Psychic: What's Your Dog Thinking?

programme.title: Sort Your Life Out
programme.desc: Stacey and her team help Tom, Chloe and their two daughters transform their home. In the warehouse, the family go through 459 books and magazines, 326 pieces of baking equipment, and 1672 toys.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Sharon and Brad are facing financial ruin due to a business deal gone wrong. Their only escape is to sell their home for the best price possible. Can Andrew, Shayna and Charlie help turn their life around?

programme.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
programme.desc: The three finalists compete in three tough challenges set by Savile Row's Patrick Grant and sewing expert May Martin who must decide who will take the title of Britain's best amateur sewer. The first test is to follow a pattern for a man's shirt. The judges are looking for perfect top stitching with no pleats or puckers but the complicated challenge drives one sewer to tears. In the second challenge they have to show off their hand sewing skills, decorating an evening bag, and for the finale they are asked to create the most demanding garment so far - a stunning made-to-measure evening dress in a luxury fabric. The finalists are in for a surprise when they see who their models are.

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: Twelve home potters compete as judges Keith Brymer Jones & Rich Miller set a soup set challenge. A surprise galleried jar task must survive the bucket of doom.

programme.desc: Alan and his team of gardening experts head to Waltham Abbey to create a tropical escape with a yoga deck and home office at its heart for a selfless leukaemia survivor. The restful garden escape that the team create for her features exotic looking palms, beautiful lighting, and a restful waterfeature.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team visit Burton Constable Hall near Hull. Objects inspected by Fiona Bruce and the experts include the first transatlantic airmail letter, brought on the plane piloted by Alcock and Brown in 1919, uncomfortable diaries of an SS officer imprisoned in Britain in World War II, and letters from the founder of modern nursing, Florence Nightingale. The award for most curious acquisition of the day must go to a bronze figure which was swapped for fish and chip suppers. One family bring in 1500 shoe buckles obsessively collected by a late husband. His investment proves to be a wise decision, however, when expert Judith Miller delivers the valuation.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Anita Manning joins experts Kate Bliss & Thomas Forrester at Newark Antiques Fair, where reds & blues go head to head to find bargains they hope will profit at Christmas auction.

programme.desc: A rebellious student and a perfectionist overachiever form an unlikely alliance in the race for student body president, discovering unexpected feelings as competition heats up.

programme.title: Wicked
programme.desc: In Oz, two clashing witches, Elphaba and Glinda, form an unlikely friendship. Elphaba, wrongly labeled wicked, seeks to expose the corrupt Wizard ruling the land.

programme.title: Anora
programme.desc: Anora, a Brooklyn sex worker, marries an oligarch's son. But when the news reaches Russia, his parents rush to New York to have the marriage annulled, threatening her fairytale.

programme.desc: A modern exploration of On the Road, as celebrities and travellers reflect on real experiences in a digital world, mirroring Kerouac's search for genuine connection.

programme.desc: After his home is conquered by the tyrannical emperors who now lead Rome, Lucius is forced to enter the Colosseum and must look to his past to find strength to return the glory of Rome to its people.

programme.desc: Leaders of the wealthiest democracies face absurd challenges as night falls in misty woods, realising they are suddenly alone and struggling with their incompetence.

programme.desc: A rebellious student and a perfectionist overachiever form an unlikely alliance in the race for student body president, discovering unexpected feelings as competition heats up.

programme.title: Erin Brockovich
programme.desc: Erin Brockovich, a struggling single mum who exposes a powerful utility company for dumping deadly toxic waste which is slowly poisoning the local residents. Employed as a filing clerk in her lawyer's firm, the former beauty queen stumbles across this landmark case that transforms her into a working class hero.

programme.title: Instant Family
programme.desc: Pete and Ellie must learn the ropes of instant parenthood when they bring in three foster children. Inspired by a true story, discover this must-see family comedy from the creators of Daddy's Home.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Jo March reflects back and forth on her life, telling the beloved story of the March sisters - four young women, each determined to live life on her own terms.

programme.title: American Pie 2
programme.desc: The characters you love are back, in the comedy hit that's even more outrageous than the original. One year after the prom-night misadventures immortalised in American Pie, the entire gang has reunited for the summer. Now, an innocent-looking beach house will be transformed into the ultimate party central. Five guys will discover the powerful bonds of friendship - and super glue. Five girls will explore the mysteries of love and the rule of three. From late-night band camp encounters to some very accommodating next-door neighbours, this will be one summer vacation none of them will ever forget.

programme.title: It's Complicated
programme.desc: With a thriving bakery, a new romance and her divorce finally behind her, Jane Adler has her life all figured out, until her ex-husband Jake decides he'll stop at nothing to win her back.

programme.title: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: Annie's life is a mess. But when she finds out her lifetime best friend is engaged, she simply must serve as Lillian's maid of honour. Though lovelorn and broke, Annie bluffs her way through the expensive and bizarre rituals. With one chance to get it perfect, she'll show Lillian and her bridesmaids just how far you'll go for someone you love.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: Join Diane Keaton, Bette Midler and Goldie Hawn in this sinfully satisfying revenge romp about a trio of first wives who team up to teach their lying, cheating ex-husbands a lesson. Ivana Trump's galvanising cameo - 'don't get mad, dahlinks, get everytink' - sets the scene in a comedy that hinges on the self-mockery of its ageless stars. Midler's ball-busting shtick, Keaton's ditsy vulnerability and Hawn's eternal youth are just light-hearted grist for the mill of female friendship as a serious source of strength.

programme.title: Knocked Up
programme.desc: Allison Scott is an up-and-coming entertainment journalist whose 24-year-old life is on the fast track. But it gets seriously derailed when a drunken one-night stand with slacker Ben Stone results in an unexpected pregnancy. Faced with the prospect of going it alone or getting to know the baby's father, Allison decides to give the lovable layabout a chance. An overgrown kid with no desire to settle down, Ben learns he has a big decision to make with his kid's mother-to-be: will he run or stay?

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary
programme.desc: Bridget Jones is a busy journalist and singleton lost amid a sea of smug-marrieds in London. After vowing to abandon her many vices, Bridget turns over a new page by channelling her opinions and insecurities in a journal that becomes a hilarious chronicle of her misadventures. Soon, Bridget finds herself stuck in the sights of not one, but two men: her dashing boss Daniel, who thrives on bad behaviour; and the brooding Mark, who she despises but somehow can't get away from.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason
programme.desc: Not that Bridget's counting, but it's been six weeks, four days, and seven hours with flawless boyfriend, Mark Darcy. When Daniel Cleaver returns, can Bridget find a way to make true love last forever?

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby
programme.desc: After breaking up with Mark Darcy, Bridget Jones's "happily ever after" hasn't quite gone according to plan. Fortysomething and single again, she decides to focus on her job as top news producer and surround herself with old friends and new. For once, Bridget has everything completely under control. What could possibly go wrong? Then her love life takes a turn and Bridget meets a dashing American named Jack, the suitor who is everything Mr. Darcy is not. In an unlikely twist she finds herself pregnant, but with one hitch she can only be fifty percent sure of the identity of her baby's father.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Mad About the Boy
programme.desc: After jumping back into the dating pool, single mother Bridget Jones finds herself caught between a younger man and her son's science teacher.

programme.title: The Addams Family (1991)
programme.desc: A swindler claiming to be their long-lost Uncle Fester tries to steal a fortune from the kooky and spooky Addams family.

programme.title: The Best Christmas Pageant Ever
programme.desc: Nobody is ready for the mayhem and surprises that ensue when six of the worst youngsters disrupt the town's yearly Christmas performance.

programme.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: While visiting the Earth at Night, a group of alien botanists is discovered and disturbed by an approaching human task force. Because of the more than hasty take-off, one of the visitors is left behind. The little alien finds himself all alone on a very strange planet. Fortunately, the extra-terrestrial soon finds a friend and emotional companion in 10-year-old Elliot, who discovered him looking for food in his family's garden shed. While E.T. slowly gets acquainted with Elliot's brother Michael, his sister Gertie as well as with Earth customs, members of the task force work day and night to track down the whereabouts of Earth's first visitor from Outer Space.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: A home-schooled newcomer is introduced to the blackboard jungle, where she joins the social outcasts in a planned sabotage of the cool kids.

programme.title: American Pie: The Wedding
programme.desc: Stifler takes centre stage in the funniest and grossest sequel to the American Pie series. Jim and Michelle's wedding plans are rushed through and nothing goes smoothly in this instalment that will have you rolling in the aisles This farcical conclusion to the breakthrough series has enough poo jokes, pre-wedding crimes against nature and goofiness to keep die-hard Pie-eaters coming back for more.

programme.title: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: Sophie has just one wish to make her wedding perfect: to have her father walk her down the aisle. Now she just has to find out who he is. Join the music, laughter and fun of the irresistibly charming musical celebration of mothers, daughters and fathers, and true loves lost and new ones found. Based on the Broadway smash-hit and filled with the ABBA songs you know and love, it's the feel-good experience that will have you singing and dancing over and over again.

programme.title: Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again
programme.desc: Discover Donna's young life, experiencing the fun she had with the three possible dads of Sophie. Sophie is now pregnant. Like Donna, she'll be a young mother, and she realizes that she'll need to take risks like her mother did.

programme.title: The River Wild
programme.desc: A former river guide arranges a white-water rafting trip to celebrate her son's birthday and salvage her shaky marriage. Her skills and courage are soon put to the test when three mysterious strangers threaten to turn their vacation into a living hell.

programme.title: Erin Brockovich
programme.desc: Erin Brockovich, a struggling single mum who exposes a powerful utility company for dumping deadly toxic waste which is slowly poisoning the local residents. Employed as a filing clerk in her lawyer's firm, the former beauty queen stumbles across this landmark case that transforms her into a working class hero.

programme.title: Tuesday
programme.desc: A mother and her teenage daughter must confront Death when it arrives in the form of an astonishing talking bird.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Jo March reflects back and forth on her life, telling the beloved story of the March sisters - four young women, each determined to live life on her own terms.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Eccentric scientist John Hammond plans to open a theme park consisting of live dinosaurs, genetically engineered from DNA. Archaeologists Alan Grant and Ellie Sattler are invited to view the park, only to find themselves being hunted when the dinosaurs break free.

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: It has been four years since the disaster at Jurassic Park and two groups are in a race against time that will determine the fate of the remote island's prehistoric inhabitants.

programme.title: Jurassic Park III
programme.desc: Desperate to find their missing son, Paul and his wife Amanda trick eminent palaeontologist Dr Alan Grant into accompanying them to Isla Sorna. The small team embark on a dangerous task, searching through a deserted island inhabited by ferocious dinosaurs.

programme.title: Jurassic World
programme.desc: The Jurassic World theme park lets guests experience the thrill of witnessing actual dinosaurs, but something ferocious lurks behind the park's attractions - a genetically modified dinosaur with savage capabilities. When the massive creature escapes, chaos erupts across the island. Now it's up to Owen and Claire to save the park's tourists from an all-out prehistoric assault.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom
programme.desc: When the abandoned island's dormant volcano begins roaring to life, Owen and Claire mount a campaign to rescue the remaining dinosaurs from this extinction-level event.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Dominion
programme.desc: With Earth once again dominated by prehistoric predators, two generations of heroes must unite for a globe-spanning adventure to shape the destiny of humans and dinosaurs.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Rebirth
programme.desc: Zora Bennett leads a team to a deadly island lab to retrieve dinosaur DNA with life-saving potential, but they uncover a shocking secret buried for decades.

programme.title: Picnic
programme.desc: The son of the richest man in town wants to marry the town's beauty queen, but then she meets an interesting stranger who just got off the train.

programme.title: Step Up
programme.desc: When a teenage rebel crosses the path of a beautiful ballerina his gift for dance is revealed. Soon he is torn between his past life and a journey for a dream.

programme.title: Ghost
programme.desc: A murdered man returns to save the woman he loves from a similar fate.

programme.title: The Sweetest Heart
programme.desc: With help from a handsome banker, Maddie tries to save her business. When her first love returns home, she must choose between a new romance and the man she never stopped loving.

programme.title: Matchmaker Mysteries: A Fatal Romance
programme.desc: When a romance writer is murdered, matchmaker Angie Dove and Detective Kyle Cooper must read between the lines to find the killer.

programme.title: The Story of Us
programme.desc: After 15 years of marriage, Ben is still the free-spirited person he's always been while Katie is left to handle life's messy little problems. So when the kids go off to summer camp, they face the most important decision of their married life. Do they end their story or begin a new chapter? From start to finish, this film gives us reason to laugh and cry in an entertaining outlook on marriage.

programme.title: The Whole Nine Yards
programme.desc: Well, there goes the neighbourhood - in a pine box. When hit man Jimmy "The Tulip" Tudeski moves into a comfy suburb, everyone's suddenly in danger of pushing up daisies. And it's not all Jimmy's doing either. Jonathan Lynn directs and a talented ensemble cast packs heat in this manic comedy about life, love and plenty of ammo. Bruce Willis plays Jimmy, whose arrival sparks a chain reaction in which just about everybody wants to clip somebody else. Matthew Perry plays a hapless dentist who finds a way to get on the Tulip's good and bad sides.

programme.title: Picnic
programme.desc: The son of the richest man in town wants to marry the town's beauty queen, but then she meets an interesting stranger who just got off the train.

programme.title: Step Up
programme.desc: When a teenage rebel crosses the path of a beautiful ballerina his gift for dance is revealed. Soon he is torn between his past life and a journey for a dream.

programme.title: Fifty Shades of Grey
programme.desc: In the worldwide phenomenon, Ana is an inexperienced college student tasked with interviewing enigmatic billionaire Christian Grey. But what starts as business quickly becomes an unconventional romance. Swept up in Christian's glamorous lifestyle, Ana soon finds another side to him as she discovers his secrets and explores her own dark desires. What results is a thrilling, all-consuming romance as Christian and Ana test the limits they will go to for their relationship.

programme.title: Ghost
programme.desc: A murdered man returns to save the woman he loves from a similar fate.

programme.title: Matchmaker Mysteries: A Fatal Romance
programme.desc: When a romance writer is murdered, matchmaker Angie Dove and Detective Kyle Cooper must read between the lines to find the killer.

programme.title: The Story of Us
programme.desc: After 15 years of marriage, Ben is still the free-spirited person he's always been while Katie is left to handle life's messy little problems. So when the kids go off to summer camp, they face the most important decision of their married life. Do they end their story or begin a new chapter? From start to finish, this film gives us reason to laugh and cry in an entertaining outlook on marriage.

programme.title: My Best Friend's Wedding
programme.desc: Julianne is almost 28 and still single, but that's OK because on her 28th birthday, Michael is going to propose, thanks to a safety net pact they made in their youth. But when the phone call finally comes, her best friend has found someone else. With Michael unavailable, Julianne realises that she loves him and must stop his wedding!

programme.title: Perfect Romance
programme.desc: In the process of matchmaking for her daughter, a mother meets an unlikely romantic interest.

programme.title: Wimbledon
programme.desc: Pro tennis "hot shot" Lizzie Bradbury is a rising star who lives to win. But when she falls for long-shot contender Peter Colt amid the glitz and glamour of Wimbledon, Lizzie discovers it's not if you win or lose, but how you play the game ... of love. A deliciously witty romantic comedy about chasing your dreams and risking your heart, this filmis a fun and charming story of love across the net.

programme.title: In My Dreams
programme.desc: Natalie and Nick are frustrated with their luck in romance. After tossing coins into a fountain, the two then begin dreaming about each other. But, according to fountain mythology, they only have a week to turn those dreams into reality.

programme.title: Suddenly 30
programme.desc: A hilarious flash-forward romance about a pre-teen girl who goes from geek to glamorous. With the help of some magic wishing dust, 13-year-old Jenna Rink becomes 30 and gorgeous overnight, with everything she ever wanted, except for her best friend Matt. Now, this grown woman must create some magic of her own to help the little girl inside find the true love she left behind.

programme.title: MatchMaker Mysteries: Art of the Kill
programme.desc: Angie Dove, her father and Detective Carter investigate murder, theft, blackmail and fraud at the museum.

programme.title: Downton Abbey: A New Era
programme.desc: The Crawley family goes on a grand journey to the South of France to uncover the mystery of the dowager countess's newly inherited villa.

programme.title: The Holiday
programme.desc: Iris is in love with a man who is about to marry another woman. Across the globe, Amanda, realizes the man she lives with has been unfaithful. Two women who have never met and live 6000 miles apart, find themselves in the exact same place. They meet online at a home exchange website and impulsively switch homes for the holiday. Iris moves into Amanda's L.A. house in sunny California as Amanda arrives in the snow covered English countryside. Shortly after arriving at their destinations, both women find the last thing either wants or expects: a new romance. Amanda is charmed by Iris' handsome brother Graham and Iris, with inspiration provided by legendary screenwriter Arthur, mends her heart when she meets film composer Miles.

programme.title: Perfect Romance
programme.desc: In the process of matchmaking for her daughter, a mother meets an unlikely romantic interest.

programme.title: Catch and Release
programme.desc: Gray Wheeler just lost everything. But it could be the best thing that ever happened to her. After the death of her fiance, Gray moves in with her late love's best friends. While Sam and Dennis do their best to cheer Gray up, Fritz doesn't seem to care. Once Gray breaks through Fritz's defences, however, she finally sees why her fiance thought so highly of him. As they spend more time together, Gray learns that her chances for love have not died out with her fiance. But when some surprise guests show up on their doorstep, it'll take the love of all of her new friends to help Gray learn that life may be messy, but love is messier.

programme.title: Wimbledon
programme.desc: Pro tennis "hot shot" Lizzie Bradbury is a rising star who lives to win. But when she falls for long-shot contender Peter Colt amid the glitz and glamour of Wimbledon, Lizzie discovers it's not if you win or lose, but how you play the game ... of love. A deliciously witty romantic comedy about chasing your dreams and risking your heart, this filmis a fun and charming story of love across the net.

programme.title: MatchMaker Mysteries: Art of the Kill

programme.title: Downton Abbey: A New Era
programme.desc: The Crawley family goes on a grand journey to the South of France to uncover the mystery of the dowager countess's newly inherited villa.

programme.title: The Holiday

Amanda is charmed by Iris' handsome brother Graham and Iris, with inspiration provided by legendary screenwriter Arthur, mends her heart when she meets film composer Miles.

programme.title: Wanderlust
programme.desc: After George is downsized from his financial firm and Linda's depressing documentary is cancelled, they can no longer afford their overpriced 'micro-loft' in New York. They find themselves with just one option - to pack up their lives and head south to move in with George's brother and his wife. George and Linda stumble upon Elysium, an idyllic community where the only rule is to be yourself.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason
programme.desc: Not that Bridget's counting, but it's been six weeks, four days, and seven hours with flawless boyfriend, Mark Darcy. When Daniel Cleaver returns, can Bridget find a way to make true love last forever?

programme.title: Love Actually
programme.desc: Love's causing chaos all over London. Even the PM is smitten. Ten separate stories intertwine in a Christmas Eve climax.

programme.title: You're Bacon Me Crazy
programme.desc: Cleo Morelli, an aspiring Portland chef, tries to win a food truck competition. When a handsome chef from a rival food truck parks across the street from her, Cleo's goal to win takes a spicy turn.

programme.title: St. Elmo's Fire
programme.desc: Struggling to make sense of life after college, seven friends trade lovers, secrets, and yada-yadas at their favourite college hang-out, until a final crisis involving dysfunctional party girl, Jules, forces them out of the nest.

programme.title: Some Kind of Wonderful
programme.desc: From the director of Pretty in Pink, comes this high-school romance starring Eric Stoltz as a misfit whose crush on a teen queen takes him on a voyage of self discovery. Keith (Stoltz) thinks he is in love with Amanda (Lea Thompson) while tomboy Watts (Mary Stuart Masterson) pines for Keith. Meanwhile, Amanda wishes she were loved by her current boyfriend, Hardy Jenns ( Craig Sheffer), whilst Hardy is only in love with himself.

programme.title: Wanderlust
programme.desc: After George is downsized from his financial firm and Linda's depressing documentary is cancelled, they can no longer afford their overpriced 'micro-loft' in New York. They find themselves with just one option - to pack up their lives and head south to move in with George's brother and his wife. George and Linda stumble upon Elysium, an idyllic community where the only rule is to be yourself.

programme.title: And So It Goes
programme.desc: There are a million reasons not to like realtor Oren Little, and that's just the way he likes it. Wilfully obnoxious to anyone who might cross his path, he wants nothing more than to sell one last house and retire in peace and quiet, until his estranged son suddenly drops off a granddaughter he never knew existed and turns his life upside-down. Clueless about how to care for a sweet, abandoned nine-year-old, he pawns her off to his determined and lovable neighbour Leah and tries to resume his life uninterrupted. But little by little, Oren stubbornly learns to open his heart to his family, to Leah and to life itself.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason
programme.desc: Not that Bridget's counting, but it's been six weeks, four days, and seven hours with flawless boyfriend, Mark Darcy. When Daniel Cleaver returns, can Bridget find a way to make true love last forever?

programme.title: St. Elmo's Fire

programme.title: The Sweetest Heart
programme.desc: With help from a handsome banker, Maddie tries to save her business. When her first love returns home, she must choose between a new romance and the man she never stopped loving.

programme.title: Kiss My Act
programme.desc: An aspiring stand-up comedian with low self-esteem gives her best material to a pretty colleague who attracts a talent scout.

programme.title: Picnic
programme.desc: The son of the richest man in town wants to marry the town's beauty queen, but then she meets an interesting stranger who just got off the train.

programme.title: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: Sophie has just one wish to make her wedding perfect: to have her father walk her down the aisle. Now she just has to find out who he is. Join the music, laughter and fun of the irresistibly charming musical celebration of mothers, daughters and fathers, and true loves lost and new ones found. Based on the Broadway smash-hit and filled with the ABBA songs you know and love, it's the feel-good experience that will have you singing and dancing over and over again.

programme.title: Mary Queen of Scots
programme.desc: A historical drama about the life of the Scottish monarch, Mary Stuart, and her contentious rivalry with her cousin, Elizabeth I. Upon the death of her husband, the King of France, 18-year-old Mary returns to her native Scotland to reclaim her rightful place on the English throne, thereby threatening the reign of Elizabeth I. Both powerful women in a world dominated by men, Mary and Elizabeth vie against each other for love, authority and influence as they each seek to fortify their respective thrones.

programme.title: Pride And Prejudice (2005)
programme.desc: Mr Bennet is an English gentleman living in Hertfordshire with his overbearing wife and five daughters; the beautiful Jane, the clever Elizabeth, the bookish Mary, the immature Kitty and the wild Lydia. Unfortunately for the Bennet's, if Mr Bennet dies their house will be inherited by a distant cousin whom they have never met, so the family's future happiness and security is dependent on the daughters making good marriages. Life is uneventful until the arrival in the neighbourhood of the rich gentleman Mr Bingley, who rents a large house so he can spend the summer in the country. Mr Bingley brings with him his two sisters and the dashing but proud Mr Darcy. Love is soon in the air for one of the Bennet sisters, while another may have jumped to a hasty prejudgment. For the Bennet sisters many trials and tribulations stand between them and their happiness, including class, gossip and scandal.

programme.title: Fifty Shades Darker
programme.desc: When a wounded Christian Grey tried to entice a cautious Ana Steele back into his life, she demands a new arrangement before she will give him another chance. As the two begin to build trust and find stability, shadowy figures from Christian's past start to circle the couple, determined to destroy their hopes for a future together.

programme.title: The Sweetest Heart
programme.desc: With help from a handsome banker, Maddie tries to save her business. When her first love returns home, she must choose between a new romance and the man she never stopped loving.

programme.title: This Time Next Year
programme.desc: Minnie and Quinn are born on the same day, one minute apart. Their lives may begin together, but their worlds couldn't be more different. Years later they find themselves together again. Maybe it's time to take a chance on love.

programme.title: Kiss My Act
programme.desc: An aspiring stand-up comedian with low self-esteem gives her best material to a pretty colleague who attracts a talent scout.

programme.title: Picnic
programme.desc: The son of the richest man in town wants to marry the town's beauty queen, but then she meets an interesting stranger who just got off the train.

programme.title: Mary Queen of Scots
programme.desc: A historical drama about the life of the Scottish monarch, Mary Stuart, and her contentious rivalry with her cousin, Elizabeth I. Both powerful women in a world dominated by men, Mary and Elizabeth vie against each other for love, authority and influence as they each seek to fortify their respective thrones.

As the two begin to build trust and find stability, shadowy figures from Christian's past start to circle the couple, determined to destroy their hopes for a future together.

programme.title: My Best Friend's Wedding
programme.desc: Julianne is almost 28 and still single, but that's OK because on her 28th birthday, Michael is going to propose, thanks to a safety net pact they made in their youth. But when the phone call finally comes, her best friend has found someone else. With Michael unavailable, Julianne realises that she loves him and must stop his wedding!

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary
programme.desc: Bridget Jones is a busy journalist and singleton lost amid a sea of smug-marrieds in London. After vowing to abandon her many vices, Bridget turns over a new page by channelling her opinions and insecurities in a journal that becomes a hilarious chronicle of her misadventures. Soon, Bridget finds herself stuck in the sights of not one, but two men: her dashing boss Daniel, who thrives on bad behaviour; and the brooding Mark, who she despises but somehow can't get away from.

programme.title: Step Up
programme.desc: When a teenage rebel crosses the path of a beautiful ballerina his gift for dance is revealed. Soon he is torn between his past life and a journey for a dream.

programme.title: Steel Magnolias
programme.desc: In this poignant and often hilarious film a wedding is about to take place in Chinquapin, Louisiana. Bride Shelby is a headstrong young beauty whose iron-willed mother, M'Lynn, would do anything for her. Giant-haired Dolly Parton is Truvy, the owner of the beauty parlour that serves as the town's unofficial hub. Dropping in to exchange gossip are Ouiser, the richest and meanest woman in town, and Clairee, an elegant widow with a sly delivery. The atmosphere is further enlivened by the wacky new girl, Annelle, a gawky trainee with cat-woman glasses and a mysterious past. These six 'steel magnolias' huddle together and provide each other with strength, friendship and an audience for each other's jokes as they negotiate the ups and downs of life and love in a small Southern town.

programme.title: Duplicity
programme.desc: When two sexy spies-turned-corporate operatives in the midst of a clandestine love affair find themselves on either side of an all-out corporate war, they'll put everything on the line to remain one double-cross ahead in a high-stakes game of cat-and-mouse.

programme.title: It's Complicated
programme.desc: With a thriving bakery, a new romance and her divorce finally behind her, Jane Adler has her life all figured out, until her ex-husband Jake decides he'll stop at nothing to win her back.

programme.title: My Best Friend's Wedding
programme.desc: Julianne is almost 28 and still single, but that's OK because on her 28th birthday, Michael is going to propose, thanks to a safety net pact they made in their youth. But when the phone call finally comes, her best friend has found someone else. With Michael unavailable, Julianne realises that she loves him and must stop his wedding!

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: A home-schooled newcomer is introduced to the blackboard jungle, where she joins the social outcasts in a planned sabotage of the cool kids.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary
programme.desc: Bridget Jones is a busy journalist and singleton lost amid a sea of smug-marrieds in London. After vowing to abandon her many vices, Bridget turns over a new page by channelling her opinions and insecurities in a journal that becomes a hilarious chronicle of her misadventures. Soon, Bridget finds herself stuck in the sights of not one, but two men: her dashing boss Daniel, who thrives on bad behaviour; and the brooding Mark, who she despises but somehow can't get away from.

programme.title: Step Up
programme.desc: When a teenage rebel crosses the path of a beautiful ballerina his gift for dance is revealed. Soon he is torn between his past life and a journey for a dream.

programme.title: Steel Magnolias
programme.desc: In this poignant and often hilarious film a wedding is about to take place in Chinquapin, Louisiana. Bride Shelby is a headstrong young beauty whose iron-willed mother, M'Lynn, would do anything for her. Giant-haired Dolly Parton is Truvy, the owner of the beauty parlour that serves as the town's unofficial hub. Dropping in to exchange gossip are Ouiser, the richest and meanest woman in town, and Clairee, an elegant widow with a sly delivery. The atmosphere is further enlivened by the wacky new girl, Annelle, a gawky trainee with cat-woman glasses and a mysterious past. These six 'steel magnolias' huddle together and provide each other with strength, friendship and an audience for each other's jokes as they negotiate the ups and downs of life and love in a small Southern town.

programme.title: Duplicity
programme.desc: When two sexy spies-turned-corporate operatives in the midst of a clandestine love affair find themselves on either side of an all-out corporate war, they'll put everything on the line to remain one double-cross ahead in a high-stakes game of cat-and-mouse.

programme.title: Billy Elliot
programme.desc: Eleven-year-old miner's son Billy Elliot is on his way to boxing lessons when he stumbles upon a ballet class. Billy secretly joins the class, knowing that his blue-collar family would never understand. Under the guidance of his teacher, Mrs Wilkinson, Billy's raw talent takes flight. When his father discovers his son's ambition, Billy must fight for his dreams and his destiny.

programme.title: Father Stu
programme.desc: After surviving a motorcycle accident, a former boxer and long-time agnostic starts to wonder if he can use his second chance to help others, and his journey from self-destruction to redemption inspired countless people along the way.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time... In Hollywood
programme.desc: The highly anticipated 9th film from Quentin Tarantino. In 1969 Los Angeles, during the Charles Manson murders, a TV actor and his stunt double, embark on an odyssey to make a name for themselves in the film industry.

programme.title: Cold Pursuit
programme.desc: Welcome to Kehoe, it's -10 degrees and counting at this glitzy ski resort in the Rocky Mountains. The local police aren't used to much action until the son of unassuming town snowplough driver, Nels Coxman, is murdered at the order of Viking, a flamboyant drug lord. Fuelled by rage and armed with heavy machinery, Nels sets out to dismantle the cartel one man at a time, but his understanding of murder comes mainly from what he read in a crime novel. As the bodies pile up, his actions ignite a turf war between Viking and his long-standing rival White Bull, a soulful Native-American mafia boss, that will quickly escalate and turn the small town's bright white slopes blood-red.

programme.title: Cliffhanger
programme.desc: Gabe Walker is a member of the mountain-climbing rescue team. While crossing a ledge 1220m above the Earth, Gabe's friend's equipment fails and she slips out of his hand, falling to her death. Almost a year after, he must return to those dreaded peaks, where he finds himself trapped in a desperate battle against ruthless criminals, unforgiving nature and himself.

programme.title: Cape Fear
programme.desc: Fourteen years after being imprisoned, vicious psychopath Max Cady emerges with a single-minded mission: to seek revenge on his attorney Sam Bowden. Cady becomes a terrifying presence as he menacingly circles Bowden's increasingly unstable family. Realising he is legally powerless to protect his beautiful wife Leigh and his troubled teenage daughter Danielle, Sam resorts to unorthodox measures which lead to an unforgettable showdown on Cape Fear.

programme.title: Billy Elliot
programme.desc: Eleven-year-old miner's son Billy Elliot is on his way to boxing lessons when he stumbles upon a ballet class. Billy secretly joins the class, knowing that his blue-collar family would never understand. Under the guidance of his teacher, Mrs Wilkinson, Billy's raw talent takes flight. When his father discovers his son's ambition, Billy must fight for his dreams and his destiny.

Almost a year after, he must return to those dreaded peaks, where he finds himself trapped in a desperate battle against ruthless criminals, unforgiving nature and himself.

programme.title: Cape Fear
programme.desc: Fourteen years after being imprisoned, vicious psychopath Max Cady emerges with a single-minded mission: to seek revenge on his attorney Sam Bowden. Cady becomes a terrifying presence as he menacingly circles Bowden's increasingly unstable family. Realising he is legally powerless to protect his beautiful wife Leigh and his troubled teenage daughter Danielle, Sam resorts to unorthodox measures which lead to an unforgettable showdown on Cape Fear.

programme.title: The Phantom of the Opera
programme.desc: This film tells the story of a disfigured musical genius who haunts the catacombs beneath the Paris Opera, waging a reign of terror over its occupants. When he falls fatally in love with the lovely Christine, the Phantom devotes himself to creating a new star for the Opera, exerting a strange sense of control over the young soprano as he nurtures her extraordinary talents.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: No Remorse
programme.desc: Jesse, having been suspended by the local town council, moonlights for his friend, State Homicide Commander Healy by investigating a series of murders in Boston.

programme.title: The Bourne Identity
programme.desc: Pulled from the sea with two bullets in his back, Jason Bourne discovers he has the skills of a very dangerous man and no memory of his violent past. Racing to unlock the secret of his own identity, he discovers the deadly truth: he's an elite government agent. To the government, Jason Bourne isn't just their property: he's a malfunctioning $30 million weapon. Lethally trained, built to disappear, he's an agent on the run who has to be taken out. Now, the government's top operative has become its No.1 target.

programme.title: Killer Under the Bed
programme.desc: New to town, a bullied teenager discovers a doll, riddled with pins, in her backyard shed. She soon comes to believe that the doll holds supernatural powers.

programme.title: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: A multi-layered examination of the 2009 hijacking of the US container ship Maersk Alabama by a crew of Somali pirates. The film focuses on the relationship between the Alabama's commanding officer, Captain Richard Phillips, and the Somali pirate captain, Muse, who takes him hostage. Phillips and Muse are set on an unstoppable collision course when Muse and his crew target Phillips' unarmed ship; in the ensuing standoff, 145 miles off the Somali coast, both men will find themselves at the mercy of forces beyond their control.

programme.title: Moneyball
programme.desc: Brad Pitt stars as Billy Beane, a former would-be superstar of baseball, who is now the general manager of Oakland A's team. Just before the 2002 season, Billy faces a huge problem, three of their star players have been bought by other clubs who have access to huge budgets. With a weak team with a history of losses coupled with little budget, Billy hires Yale-educated economist Peter Brand (Jonah Hill) who set about to find discards of the game who have key skills but are undervalued because they are injured or too old. The coach Art Howe (Philip Seymour Hoffman) refuses to co-operate however and Billy has to become more involved with the players and the system to see whether they have a chance of success.

programme.title: The Phantom of the Opera
programme.desc: This film tells the story of a disfigured musical genius who haunts the catacombs beneath the Paris Opera, waging a reign of terror over its occupants. When he falls fatally in love with the lovely Christine, the Phantom devotes himself to creating a new star for the Opera, exerting a strange sense of control over the young soprano as he nurtures her extraordinary talents.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: No Remorse
programme.desc: Jesse, having been suspended by the local town council, moonlights for his friend, State Homicide Commander Healy by investigating a series of murders in Boston.

programme.title: Moneyball
programme.desc: Brad Pitt stars as Billy Beane, a former would-be superstar of baseball, who is now the general manager of Oakland A's team. Just before the 2002 season, Billy faces a huge problem, three of their star players have been bought by other clubs who have access to huge budgets. The coach Art Howe (Philip Seymour Hoffman) refuses to co-operate however and Billy has to become more involved with the players and the system to see whether they have a chance of success.

programme.title: Non-Stop
programme.desc: A suspense thriller played out at 40,000 feet in the air. During a transatlantic flight from New York City to London, US Air Marshal Bill Marks receives a series of cryptic text messages demanding that he instruct the airline to transfer $150 million into an off-shore account. Until he secures the money, a passenger on his flight will be killed every 20 minutes.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Night Passage
programme.desc: A former Los Angeles lawman becomes the new police chief of a small fishing town that holds dirty secrets.

programme.title: The Bourne Legacy
programme.desc: On the verge of having their conspiracy exposed, members of the government's intelligence community will stop at nothing to erase all evidence of their top secret programs - even the agents involved. Aaron Cross must use his genetically-engineered skills to survive the ultimate game of cat-and-mouse and finish what Jason Bourne started.

programme.title: Knives Out
programme.desc: Detective Benoit Blanc is enlisted to investigate the untimely death of a renowned crime novelist. Blanc must sift through a web of red herrings and lies to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Inside Man
programme.desc: A tough cop, a clever bank robber, and a powerbroker fuel a dangerous game of cat-and-mouse full of hidden agendas and explosive surprises.

programme.title: Minority Report
programme.desc: In the year 2054, the head of a police unit specialising in pre-crime - the arrest and conviction of murderers before they commit their crime - finds himself accused of a future murder.

programme.title: Non-Stop
programme.desc: A suspense thriller played out at 40,000 feet in the air. programme.title: Lucy
programme.desc: An action-thriller about a woman accidentally caught in a dark deal that turns the tables on her captors. Altered by a dangerous new drug allowing her to use 100% of her brain capacity, Lucy transforms into a merciless warrior evolved beyond human logic.

programme.title: Cold Pursuit
programme.desc: Welcome to Kehoe, it's -10 degrees and counting at this glitzy ski resort in the Rocky Mountains. The local police aren't used to much action until the son of unassuming town snowplough driver, Nels Coxman, is murdered at the order of Viking, a flamboyant drug lord. Fuelled by rage and armed with heavy machinery, Nels sets out to dismantle the cartel one man at a time, but his understanding of murder comes mainly from what he read in a crime novel. As the bodies pile up, his actions ignite a turf war between Viking and his long-standing rival White Bull, a soulful Native-American mafia boss, that will quickly escalate and turn the small town's bright white slopes blood-red.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A small-town police chief investigates the life of an unhappy teen after her corpse is found floating in a lake.

programme.title: Elizabeth: The Golden Age
programme.desc: In late 16th century Europe, Elizabeth finds her rule openly challenged by the Spanish King Philip II with his powerful army and sea-dominating armada determined to restore England to Catholicism.

programme.title: World War Z
programme.desc: The story revolves around United Nations employee Gerry Lane, who traverses the world in a race against time to stop a pandemic that is toppling armies and governments and threatening to decimate humanity itself.

programme.title: Bastille Day
programme.desc: When a reckless CIA agent and a brilliant pickpocket uncover a large-scale conspiracy, they must work together in order to take down a common enemy.

programme.title: Lucy
programme.desc: An action-thriller about a woman accidentally caught in a dark deal that turns the tables on her captors. Altered by a dangerous new drug allowing her to use 100% of her brain capacity, Lucy transforms into a merciless warrior evolved beyond human logic.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A small-town police chief investigates the life of an unhappy teen after her corpse is found floating in a lake.

programme.title: A Man Called Otto
programme.desc: Otto is a grump who's given up on life following the loss of his wife, and wants to end it all. When a young family moves in nearby, he meets his match in quick-witted Marisol.

programme.title: Elizabeth: The Golden Age
programme.desc: In late 16th century Europe, Elizabeth finds her rule openly challenged by the Spanish King Philip II with his powerful army and sea-dominating armada determined to restore England to Catholicism.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Innocents Lost
programme.desc: A reinstated police chief (Tom Selleck) battles his own demons while investigating the death of a teenage girl.

programme.title: Bastille Day
programme.desc: When a reckless CIA agent and a brilliant pickpocket uncover a large-scale conspiracy, they must work together in order to take down a common enemy.

programme.title: American Made
programme.desc: Based on the incredible true story of Barry Seal, a drug-smuggling pilot in the 1980s who was recruited by the CIA to carry out one of the largest covert operations in history.

programme.title: Whiplash
programme.desc: Andrew Neyman is an ambitious young jazz drummer, single-minded in his pursuit to rise to the top of his elite east coast music conservatory. Plagued by the failed writing career of his father, Andrew hungers day and night to become one of the greats. Terence Fletcher, an instructor equally known for his teaching talents as for his terrifying methods, leads the top jazz ensemble in the school. Fletcher discovers Andrew and transfers the aspiring drummer into his band, forever changing the young man's life. Andrew's passion to achieve perfection quickly spirals into obsession, as his ruthless teacher continues to push him to the brink of both his ability and his sanity.

programme.title: Django Unchained
programme.desc: Set in the south two years before the Civil War, a freed slave is on a mission to rescue his wife from the notorious Calvin Candie, the proprietor of Candyland, an infamous and brutal plantation.

programme.title: Hanna
programme.desc: Hanna is a teenage girl. Uniquely, she has the strength, the stamina, and the smarts of a soldier; these come from being raised by her father, an ex-CIA man, in the wilds of Finland. Living a life unlike any other teenager, her upbringing and training have been one and the same, all geared to making her the perfect assassin. The turning point in her adolescence is a sharp one; sent into the world by her father on a mission, Hanna journeys stealthily across Europe while eluding agents dispatched after her by a ruthless intelligence operative with secrets of her own. As she nears her ultimate target, Hanna faces startling revelations about her existence and unexpected questions about her humanity.

programme.title: The Boxer
programme.desc: After being in prison for his involvement with the IRA, Danny Flynn re-opens a boxing ring in effort to heal his Belfast community, finding that a legacy of violence is not easily escaped.

programme.title: In the Name of the Father
programme.desc: Gerry Conlon is one of four men coerced into signing false confessions for the IRA bombing of the Guildford pub that killed five people. His father is also unjustly charged and imprisoned with his son. Gerry spends 14 years in prison trying to prove his innocence and clear his family's name with the help of a British lawyer. Adapted from Conlon's autobiography Proved Innocent.

programme.title: American Made
programme.desc: Based on the incredible true story of Barry Seal, a drug-smuggling pilot in the 1980s who was recruited by the CIA to carry out one of the largest covert operations in history.

programme.title: Gothika
programme.desc: A brilliant and respected criminal psychologist, Dr Miranda Grey is an expert at knowing what is rational. Under the direction of her husband, Miranda treats dangerously disturbed patients at the Woodward Penitentiary for Women. Miranda's life is thrust into terrifying jeopardy when a cryptic encounter with a mysterious young girl leads to a nightmare beyond her wildest imagination.

programme.title: Django Unchained
programme.desc: Set in the south two years before the Civil War, a freed slave is on a mission to rescue his wife from the notorious Calvin Candie, the proprietor of Candyland, an infamous and brutal plantation.

programme.title: Black Gold
programme.desc: We ignite the West Texas Oil Fields when the roughnecks of Big Dog 28 push the rig to its limit and go wildcatting. This season they'll drill into unknown territory, with higher stakes and higher drama. They're under pressure, under the gun, and under new management. Being a roughneck is going to get a whole lot rougher when Big Dog's owner, independent oilman Autry Stevens, decides to make a deal with the devil and lease land from local landowner, and hellraiser, Peggy Hauser. If he can avoid her wrath and gun, Autry stands to win millions on the wildcat gamble.

programme.title: Life Below Zero

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: For over a decade, the drivers have battled it all from ferocious storms to freezing temperatures to bitter rivalries. And, of course, they've confronted the deadly ice crossings that have tested their ability to survive. But now, as this program is in its landmark 11th season, a sense of urgency descends on the drivers. The roads are opening late and closing early. Every load could be the last one to make it up the trails. At any time, the roads could be shut down and tens of thousands of tons in freight won't be delivered. It's a rush from day one and the mission is clear: pedal to the metal and never let up. The communities are counting on them now more than ever.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: The outback is one of the world's last wild frontiers and, for the giant trucks who roam this epic, harsh country, there's only one way to get from A to B - the hard way. Whether it's taking on scorching deserts, or battling torrential rains that turn roads into rivers, this is a land that can destroy in a heartbeat. For the men and women who risk their rigs and their lives to face it, this punishing wilderness is a home away from home. We hit the road train again for lots of dirt and dangers, joining some of the toughest, most skilled truckers on the planet, as they haul their massive loads through hell on Earth. Without them, Australia would grind to a halt. Their mission: to get their freight in and their trucks out. In this episode, Jared and Johnny's epic mission grinds to a halt, Roscoe battles the elements on a world-famous rally, and Turbo is flagged down by the police.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: The outback is one of the world's last wild frontiers and, for the giant trucks who roam this epic, harsh country, there's only one way to get from A to B - the hard way. Without them, Australia would grind to a halt. Their mission: to get their freight in and their trucks out. In this episode, Carl Andrews gets behind the wheel to transport a sizeable load, Russell's mobile classroom is shaken, and the Ferrises manage to dodge raging bush fires.

programme.title: Cabin Truckers
programme.desc: There's a dream home - and there's a dream location. Cabin Truckers follows the incredible exploits of hauling colossal cabins to remote, picturesque locations. Watch as an expert team navigates through extremely rocky, mountainous terrain, delivering precious cargo to thrilled home owners.

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn
programme.desc: In a time when creditors have closed their purse strings and stopped lending, the residents of Detroit know they can always rely on American Jewelry and Loan, 'The Working Man's Bank'. Follow the Gold family as they wheel and deal with colourful customers, manage temperamental employees, and squabble with each other, all in the name of making a buck in one of the most troubled cities in America.

Without them, Australia would grind to a halt. Their mission: to get their freight in and their trucks out. In this episode, Carl Andrews gets behind the wheel to transport a sizeable load, Russell's mobile classroom is shaken, and the Ferrises manage to dodge raging bush fires.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: The outback is one of the world's last wild frontiers and, for the giant trucks who roam this epic, harsh country, there's only one way to get from A to B - the hard way. Whether it's taking on scorching deserts, or battling torrential rains that turn roads into rivers, this is a land that can destroy in a heartbeat. For the men and women who risk their rigs and their lives to face it, this punishing wilderness is a home away from home. We hit the road train again for lots of dirt and dangers, joining some of the toughest, most skilled truckers on the planet, as they haul their massive loads through hell on Earth. Without them, Australia would grind to a halt. Their mission: to get their freight in and their trucks out. In this episode, Christian racks up massive mileage with a huge load of cargo, Turbo faces chaos, and the Wise couple feel the pressure of a fuel-draining headwind.

Armed with charm, intellect, and a meticulous mind, he begins plotting the impossible: an escape that will become one of the most audacious in Australian history.

programme.title: Spooks
programme.desc: The missions of MI5, the UK's domestic intelligence organisation.

programme.title: Wentworth
programme.desc: When Bea is sentenced to life without parole for the killing of Brayden Holt, Ferguson makes it very clear - she owns Bea now. So when Bea uses her standing as Top Dog to hit back, Ferguson takes revenge - she slots Bea and releases Liz from Protection, exposing Liz to a brutal bashing from Boomer. But Ferguson has underestimated Bea, who starts a riot amongst the prisoners. With the prison in lock-down Ferguson has to turn to Bea to quell the riot. Wentworth isn't Ferguson's prison - it's Bea's. Battle lines are drawn.

programme.title: Hannibal
programme.desc: When Will is captured alongside Hannibal, Alana and Margot work together to rescue him from Mason's clutches.

programme.title: Tin Star
programme.desc: Michael and Catherine clash over their next move. The Worths' new plan causes problems for Anna.

channel.display-name: [Optus TV feat. Foxtel] Family HD / MO7

programme.title: Wallace & Gromit: Curse Of Were-Rabbit
programme.desc: Wallace and Gromit's latest enterprise is Anti-Pesto, pest control with a heart. When called upon by the dotty Lady Tottington to solve her rabbit infestation, Wallace tangles with her Ladyship's would-be suitor, rotten cad Victor Quartermaine. At first Wallace and Gromit seem to have things in hand. But Wallace's mind transference device malfunctions, and he's in danger of being bagged by Quartermaine. Wallace teeters perilously close to disaster and his four-legged pal, Gromit, faces almost insurmountable odds to save the day!

programme.title: Curious George
programme.desc: The Man in the Yellow Hat looks after George, the inquisitive little monkey with an insatiable taste for adventure, who sets off in a brand new tale, where his spunky and fun-loving nature endears him to new friends and launches him on a series of (mis)adventures. Based on the classic stories by Margret and H. A. Rey, the film features an old-fashioned two-dimensional animation that echoes the simple colours and shapes of the books.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit 2: The Runaway
programme.desc: Adventuring out of the garden, Peter finds himself in a world where his mischief is appreciated. When his family risks everything to come find him, he must figure out what kind of bunny he wants to be.

programme.title: Small Soldiers
programme.desc: Big action. Big fun. Big Movie! Small Soldiers is one huge adventure. Meet the Commando Elite - toy action figures with an attitude. They've escaped from their boxes along with the Gorgonites, kindhearted but unusual-looking creatures. Now teenager Alan Abernathy gets enlisted to help the Gorgonites and rescue the girl of his dreams before the whole town is turned upside down.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Welcome to the Hotel Transylvania. Dracula, who runs a five-stake resort away from the human world, goes into overprotective mode when a boy discovers the resort and falls for the count's daughter.

programme.title: Combat Wombat
programme.desc: On the outskirts of Sanctuary City lives Maggie Diggins, a cantankerous wombat left at odds with society who, after a tragic digging accident resulted in the disappearance of her husband, now lives out a solitary existence in her cozy burrow. On a midnight chocolate run to the convenience store, she unwittingly stops an altercation between a gang of Drop Bears and a young sugar glider with a one-two punch from her powerful rump. The superhero obsessed sugar glider, named Sweetie, marvels over Maggie's bootylicious crime fighting antics and she is thrust into the limelight as township's newest superhero. Spurred on by Sweetie, Maggie takes on a new alias as "Combat Wombat", a friendly, yet fierce female crime fighter, who immediately wins over the city's people. However, not everyone is happy to welcome this newcomer and she soon finds herself ruffling the feathers of previous town superhero, Flightless Feather; a capable, yet conceited cassowary.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: It's supervillain versus super-sonic in an all-out race across the globe to stop the evil genius Robotnik from using Sonic's power for world domination.

programme.title: Madagascar 3: Europe's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Alex the Lion, Marty the Zebra, Gloria the Hippo, and Melman the Giraffe are still fighting to get home to their beloved Big Apple and of course, King Julien, Maurice, and the Penguins are all along for the ride. Their journey takes them through Europe where they find the perfect cover: a travelling circus, which they reinvent Madagascar style.

programme.title: The Tale of Despereaux
programme.desc: Once upon a time, in the far away kingdom of Dor, lived a brave and virtuous mouse with comically oversized ears who dreamt of becoming a knight. Banished from his home for having such lofty ambitions, Despereaux sets off on an amazing adventure with his good-hearted rat friend Roscuro, who leads him, at long last, on a very noble quest to rescue an endangered princess and save an entire kingdom from darkness. Based on the heart-warming, bestselling children's book and featuring the voice talents of an all-star cast, this film is a magical, modern fairytale that's destined to win the hearts of young and old alike.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Clumsy and overweight panda, Po, dreams of becoming a kung fu master.

programme.title: Mr. Bean's Holiday
programme.desc: Mr Bean can't believe his luck when he wins a camcorder and an all-expense paid holiday to the French Riviera. But during his journey to the south, he falls face first into a series of mishaps.

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: After he is fired from the Anti-Villain League for failing to take down the latest bad guy to threaten humanity, Gru finds himself in the middle of a major identity crisis. When a mysterious stranger shows up to inform Gru that he has a long-lost twin brother who desperately wishes to follow in his twin's despicable footsteps, one former supervillain will rediscover just how good it feels to be bad.

programme.title: Thunderbirds
programme.desc: The world's greatest rescue squad are trapped in space while an evil enemy works overtime.

programme.title: A Boy Called Christmas
programme.desc: In this origin story of Father Christmas, an ordinary boy (with a loyal pet mouse and a reindeer at his side) sets out on an extraordinary adventure to find his father who is on a quest to discover the fabled village of Elfhelm.

programme.title: Rise of the Guardians
programme.desc: When an evil spirit known as Pitch lays down the gauntlet to take over the world, the immortal Guardians must join forces for the first time to protect the hopes, beliefs, and imagination of children all over the world.

programme.title: Major Payne
programme.desc: When peace breaks out in America, killing machine Major Benson Winifred Payne, United States Marine Corps Special Forces, is given his marching orders: to the unemployment line. Unable to cope with civilian life, Payne is thrust back into the military regiment as commander of the Madison Academy Junior ROTC.

programme.title: Dr. Seuss' the Lorax
programme.desc: Dr. Seuss' The Lorax is an adaptation of Dr. Seuss' classic tale of a forest creature who shares the enduring power of hope. In the walled city of Thneed-Ville, where everything is artificial and even the air is a commodity, a boy named Ted hopes to win the heart of his dream girl, Audrey. When he learns of her wish to see a real tree, Ted seeks out the Once-ler, a ruined old businessman outside of town in a stark wasteland. Upon hearing of how the hermit gave into his greed for profits and devastated the land over the protests of the Lorax, Ted is inspired to undo the disaster. However, the greedy Mayor of Thneed-Ville, Aloysius O'Hare, has made his fortune exploiting the environmental collapse and is determined to stop the boy from undermining his business.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
programme.desc: Worried that his half-vampire grandson isn't showing signs of being a vampire, Dracula enlists his friends to put him through 'monster-in-training' boot camp.

programme.title: The Colours Within
programme.desc: A girl who can see colours in people's hearts joins a band with two other people.

programme.title: Mr. Peabody & Sherman
programme.desc: Mr Peabody, the most accomplished dog in the world, and his mischievous boy Sherman, use their time machine - the WABAC - to go on the most outrageous adventures known to man or dog. But when Sherman takes the WABAC out for a joyride to impress his friend Penny, they accidentally rip a hole in the universe, wreaking havoc on the most important events in world history. Before they forever alter the past, present and future, Mr. Peabody must come to their rescue, ultimately facing the most daunting challenge of any era: figuring out how to be a parent. Together, the time traveling trio will make their mark on history.

programme.title: Trolls World Tour
programme.desc: Poppy and Branch discover that there are six different troll tribes scattered over six different lands. Each tribe is also devoted to six different kinds of music - funk, country, techno, classical, pop and rock. When rockers Queen Barb and King Thrash set out to destroy the other music, Poppy and Branch embark on a daring mission to unite the trolls and save the diverse melodies from becoming extinct.

programme.title: Sing 2
programme.desc: Buster Moon and his friends must persuade reclusive rock star Clay Calloway to join them for the opening of a new show.

programme.title: Piece by Piece
programme.desc: LEGO bricks tell the life story of singer, songwriter and record producer Pharrell Williams - from his childhood in Virginia to his success in the music and fashion industry.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre, with the help of an annoying donkey, tries to win back his swamp by returning a princess to a scheming lord.

programme.title: Casper
programme.desc: One of TV's most beloved characters, Casper the friendly ghost, befriends a parapsychologist's lonely daughter. He's been hired to exorcise a treasure-laden mansion haunted by three unreconstructed stooges, but Casper's brothers aren't nearly as friendly as he is!

programme.title: Curious George: Cape Ahoy
programme.desc: With help from a local fisherman, his niece and an adorable baby seal, George embarks on a quest in search of the long-lost shipwreck of legendary sea captain Trumpet Tooter.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: Peter Rabbit, the mischievous and adventurous hero who has captivated generations of readers, now takes on the starring role of his own cute, contemporary comedy with attitude. In the film, Peter's feud with Mr. McGregor escalates to greater heights than ever before as they rival for the affections of the warm-hearted animal lover who lives next door.

programme.title: Sylvanian Families: A Gift from Freya
programme.desc: In Sylvanian village, everyone awaits the Festival of the Stars, but rabbit girl Freya worries as she must find the Tree of the Year for the main event.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets
programme.desc: Taking place in a Manhattan apartment building, Max's life as a favourite pet is turned upside down, when his owner brings home a sloppy mongrel named Duke. They have to put their quarrels behind when they find out that an adorable white bunny named Snowball is building an army of lost pets determined to take revenge.

programme.title: Open Season 3
programme.desc: Boog plans an annual hunting trip for his woodland buddies but they choose family obligations which made Boog take a trip on his own leading him to a circus. He meets with Alistair a devious grizzly who wants to get out of the circus so he convinces Boog to switch places for his life in the wild for Alistair's place at the circus. While attending, Boog then falls for an alluring troupe member. Then the greedy circus ringmaster takes advantage of Boog by causing him misery and humiliation. When Boog's pals finds out about his disappearance, they hatch a rescue mission to rescue Boog and his true love.

programme.title: The Grinch
programme.desc: For their eighth fully animated feature, Illumination and Universal Pictures present "The Grinch," based on Dr. Seuss' beloved holiday classic. The Grinch tells the story of a cynical grump who goes on a mission to steal Christmas, only to have his heart changed by a young girl's generous holiday spirit. Funny, heartwarming and visually stunning, it's a universal story about the spirit of Christmas and the indomitable power of optimism.

programme.title: The Prince of Egypt
programme.desc: This is the extraordinary tale of two brothers, one born of royal blood, one an orphan with a secret past. Growing up the best of friends, they share the strong bond of free-spirited youth and good-natured rivalry. But the truth will ultimately set them at odds, as one becomes the ruler of the most powerful empire on earth, the other the chosen leader of his people. Their final confrontation will forever change their lives - and the world.

programme.title: Bee Movie
programme.desc: A bee is abuzz over a scandal: people are stealing honey to eat. With the help of a florist, he sues the human race for 'honey laundering'.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: In the brand new adventure Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle, the tables are turned as four teenagers are sucked into the world of Jumanji. When four high-school kids discover an old video game console with a game they've never heard of Jumanji they are immediately drawn into the game's jungle setting, literally becoming the avatars they chose: gamer Spencer becomes a brawny adventurer; football jock Fridge loses (in his words) 'the top two feet of his body' and becomes an Einstein; popular girl Bethany becomes a middle-aged male professor; and wallflower Martha becomes a badass warrior. What they discover is that you don't just play Jumanji you must survive it. To beat the game and return to the real world, they'll have to go on the most dangerous adventure of their lives, discover what Alan Parrish left 20 years ago, and change the way they think about themselves or they'll be stuck in the game forever.

programme.title: Lyle, Lyle, Crocodile
programme.desc: When the Primm family moves to New York City, their young son Josh struggles to adapt to his new school and new friends. All of that changes when he discovers Lyle - a singing crocodile who loves baths, caviar and great music-living in the attic of his new home. The two become fast friends, but when Lyle's existence is threatened by evil neighbour Mr. Grumps, the Primms must band together with Lyle's charismatic owner, Hector P. Valenti, to show the world that family can come from the most unexpected places and there's nothing wrong with a big singing crocodile with an even bigger personality.

programme.title: Minions
programme.desc: Starting as single-celled yellow organisms, Minions evolve through the ages, perpetually serving the most despicable of masters. Continuously unsuccessful at keeping these masters, from T-rex to Napoleon, the Minions find themselves without someone to serve and fall into a deep depression. One Minion named Kevin has a plan, and he, alongside teenage rebel Stuart and lovable little Bob, ventures out into the world to find a new evil boss for his brethren to follow. The trio embarks upon a thrilling journey that ultimately leads them to their next potential master, Scarlet Overkill, the world's first-ever female supervillain. They travel from frigid Antarctica to 1960s New York City, ending in mod London, where they must face their biggest challenge to-date: saving all of Minionkind from annihilation.

programme.title: Minions: The Rise of Gru
programme.desc: From the biggest animated franchise in history comes the origin story of how the world's greatest supervillain met his iconic minions and forged cinema's most despicable crew.

programme.title: Captain Underpants: The First Epic Movie
programme.desc: George and Harold are fourth-grade BFFs who love dreaming up funny pranks. One day, they accidentally hypnotise their principal into believing he's a dimwitted hero named Captain Underpants. But when the new schoolteacher turns out to be a disgraced scientist bent on ridding the world of laughter, George, Harold and Captain Underpants must band together to stop his evil agenda.

programme.title: Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Before he met the ogre Shrek, Puss in Boots (voice of Antonio Banderas) had a complicated life in which he was smeared with the blame of a bank robbery in San Ricardo, engineered against Puss' wishes by Humpty Dumpty (Zach Galifianakis), who was captured while trying to escape - thanks to Puss leaving him to his fate in anger. The two lifelong friends break up and it isn't until they re-unite that they trust each other again.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 3
programme.desc: When Po's long-lost panda father suddenly reappears, the reunited duo travels to a secret panda paradise to meet scores of hilarious new panda characters. When the supernatural villain Kai begins to sweep across China defeating all the kung fu masters, Po must do the impossible: learn to train a village full of his fun-loving, clumsy brethren to become the ultimate band of kung fu pandas.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Family Business
programme.desc: Boss Baby continues to navigate the cutthroat corporate jungle gym of Baby Corp, while angling to achieve the near-impossible: the work-life balance of a modern career baby.

programme.title: Prancer: A Christmas Tale
programme.desc: The tiny town of Brightridge is in for a surprise this Christmas as a mysterious reindeer and a plucky young girl work together to help her grandfather save his beloved store.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: Set in the mythical world of burly Vikings and fire-breathing dragons, a Viking teenager takes in an injured dragon and sees an opportunity to set his tribe on a new course.

programme.title: Spirit Untamed
programme.desc: The next chapter in this beloved franchise begins as a young girl finds a connection to her mother's legacy as a trick rider and forms a bond with a wild mustang named Spirit.

programme.title: Spirit: Stallion of the Cimarron
programme.desc: A tale which follows the adventures of a wild and rambunctious mustang stallion as he journeys through the untamed American frontiers, encountering man for the first time, Spirit defies being broken, even as he develops a remarkable friendship with a young Lakota brave named Little Creek. The young stallion also finds love with a beautiful paint mare named Rain on his way to becoming one of the greatest unsung heroes of the Old West.

programme.title: Woody Woodpecker
programme.desc: The hyperactive red-headed bird enters a turf war with a big city lawyer wanting to tear down his home in an effort to build a house to flip.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse: The Movie
programme.desc: Gabby's prized dollhouse falls into the hands of eccentric cat lady Vera, sending her on a real-world quest to reunite the Gabby Cats before time runs out.

programme.title: The Land Before Time XIV
programme.desc: Littlefoot and friends set out to find his father who hasn't returned from an important journey.

programme.title: Open Season
programme.desc: A clueless domesticated bear and an outcast deer try to survive trigger-happy hunters and hostile forest critters.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 3: A Monster Vacation
