programme.title: God Help The Girl
programme.desc: Life has never been easy for Eve, but this troubled young girl has a talent and songwriting becomes her way forward. Through her passion for music, she's led to Glasgow's music scene.

programme.title: Hope Gap
programme.desc: The intimate, intense and loving story of "Hope Gap" charts the life of Grace, shocked to learn her husband is leaving her for another after 29 years of marriage, and the ensuing emotional fallout the dissolution has on their only grown son. Unravelled and feeling displaced in her small seaside town, Grace ultimately regains her footing and discovers a new, powerful voice.

programme.title: Tommy's Honour
programme.desc: Tom and Tommy Morris, father and son pioneers of professional golf, rely on skill, business acumen, and working-class street smarts to make Tommy one of the world's first sports superstars.

programme.title: I Am Slave
programme.desc: A thriller set in London's slave trade and centred on a woman's fight for freedom.

programme.title: Freight
programme.desc: A Russian gang in the UK traffic eastern European people and then enslave them, the women to sex, the men to illegal fights. They cross a local businessman, and a war escalates.

programme.title: AmStarDam
programme.desc: Jack comes to Amsterdam to find his father and, through a momentary magical encounter, finds the secret weapon that could turn around his father's ailing marijuana coffee shop.

programme.title: Raging Grace
programme.desc: An undocumented Filipino immigrant takes a job as a caretaker for a terminally ill man in a lavish home, securing a better future for her family, but a dark discovery threatens to destroy everything.

programme.title: God Help The Girl
programme.desc: Life has never been easy for Eve, but this troubled young girl has a talent and songwriting becomes her way forward. Through her passion for music, she's led to Glasgow's music scene.

programme.title: Interlude in Prague
programme.desc: Tired of demonstrating his talents to a privileged elite, Mozart is brought to the Bohemian city by Baron Saloka, a vain and self-obsessed aristocrat. On his arrival, Mozart is happy to have found the one place on Earth where he feels his talent is appreciated and sets about creating a new opera. However, his unconventional presence soon unleashes a series of dramatic and tragic events set off by a forbidden affair with young soprano Zuzanna. Overwhelmed by the tangled web of lust, violence and intrigue that surrounds him, Mozart finds inspiration to create the astonishing and dramatic piece of music that will become the operatic masterpiece, Don Giovanni.

programme.title: Tommy's Honour
programme.desc: Tom and Tommy Morris, father and son pioneers of professional golf, rely on skill, business acumen, and working-class street smarts to make Tommy one of the world's first sports superstars.

programme.title: Felicia's Journey
programme.desc: A lovesick young woman searches for the father of her unborn child in seedy Birmingham and becomes involved with a mysterious catering manager.

programme.title: Freight
programme.desc: A Russian gang in the UK traffic eastern European people and then enslave them, the women to sex, the men to illegal fights. They cross a local businessman, and a war escalates.

programme.title: AmStarDam
programme.desc: Jack comes to Amsterdam to find his father and, through a momentary magical encounter, finds the secret weapon that could turn around his father's ailing marijuana coffee shop.

programme.title: Raging Grace
programme.desc: An undocumented Filipino immigrant takes a job as a caretaker for a terminally ill man in a lavish home, securing a better future for her family, but a dark discovery threatens to destroy everything.

programme.title: Suffragette
programme.desc: A powerful drama about women who were willing to lose everything in their fight for equality in early 20th-century Britain. The stirring story centres on Maud, a working wife and mother whose life is forever changed when she is secretly recruited to join the UK's growing suffragette movement. Galvanised by the outlaw fugitive Emmeline Pankhurst, Maud becomes an activist for the cause alongside women from all walks of life. When the increasingly aggressive police action forces Maud and her dedicated fellow suffragettes underground, they engage in a dangerous game of cat and mouse with the authorities, who are shocked as the women's civil disobedience escalates and sparks debate across the nation.

programme.title: Colette
programme.desc: Set at the dawn of the modern age, Colette is the story of a woman who has been long denied her voice going to extraordinary lengths to reclaim it. Gabrielle Sidonie Colette, a young woman from a country village, marries a charismatic dominating Parisian, fourteen years her senior, known by the single name, 'Willy.' Through his auspices, she is introduced to bohemian Paris where her creative appetite is sparked. Ever quick to capitalise on talent, Willy convinces his wife to write novels - to be published under his name. The phenomenal success of her "Claudine" series makes Willy well known as a writer and 'Colette and Willy' the first modern celebrity couple. Over time, lack of recognition for her work frustrates Colette, and an affair with the gender-defying Marquise de Belbeuf inspires her to break free, but Willy is determined to maintain his hold over her, at any cost.

programme.title: Brooklyn
programme.desc: Brooklyn tells the profoundly moving story of Eilis Lacey, a young Irish immigrant navigating her way through 1950s Brooklyn. Lured by the promise of America, Eilis departs Ireland and the comfort of her mother's home for the shores of New York City. The initial shackles of homesickness quickly diminish as a fresh romance sweeps Eilis into the intoxicating charm of love. But soon, her new vivacity is disrupted by her past, and Eilis must choose between two countries and the lives that exist within.

programme.title: Bend It Like Beckham
programme.desc: An Indian family in London tries to raise their soccer-playing daughter in a traditional way. Unlike her older sister, who is preparing for a lavish Indian wedding and a lifetime of cooking delicious dishes, Jess dreams of playing soccer professionally, like her hero, British soccer superstar, David Beckham. Wholeheartedly against Jess's unorthodox ambition, her parents eventually reveal that their reservations have more to do with protecting her than with holding her back. When Jess is forced to make a choice between tradition and her beloved sport, her family must decide whether to let her chase her dream, and a soccer ball.

programme.title: McClaren
programme.desc: The story of Bruce McLaren, the New Zealander who showed the world that a man of humble beginnings could take on the elite of motor racing and win.

programme.title: Death at a Funeral
programme.desc: A dignified send-off for a loved one erupts into uproarious chaos when a myriad of outrageous calamities befall the eccentric, grief-stricken mourners. The death of Daniel and Robert's father brings their entire dysfunctional family together to mourn his passing. When a man shows up at the funeral threatening to reveal the deceased man's shocking secret unless he gets some cash, the two brothers are forced to figure out a way to deal with the blackmailer. As they pull out every stop to try and prevent any news from spreading to the guests, the ceremony turns into complete chaos.

programme.title: Coriolanus
programme.desc: Caius Martius 'Coriolanus', a revered and feared Roman General is at odds with the city of Rome and his fellow citizens. Pushed by his controlling and ambitious mother Volumnia to seek the exalted and powerful position of Consul, he is loath to ingratiate himself with the masses whose votes he needs in order to secure the office. When the public refuses to support him, Coriolanus's anger prompts a riot that culminates in his expulsion from Rome. The banished hero then allies himself with his sworn enemy Tullus Aufidius to take his revenge on the city.

programme.title: Suffragette
programme.desc: A powerful drama about women who were willing to lose everything in their fight for equality in early 20th-century Britain. The stirring story centres on Maud, a working wife and mother whose life is forever changed when she is secretly recruited to join the UK's growing suffragette movement. programme.title: Toast
programme.desc: Bittersweet story of a food writer's road to adulthood via his association with culinary tastes and smells. A delicious love letter to set to the songs of Dusty Springfield.

programme.title: The Dinosaur Project
programme.desc: In this special effects thriller, a film crew in the Congo discover a lost world filled with terrifying, giant creatures thought extinct for millions of years.

programme.title: The Secret Scripture
programme.desc: Based on the best selling novel a woman committed to a mental hospital for much of her life, must rely on her diary to recount her memories to a Doctor, who is reassessing her for the move to a new facility.

programme.title: Ali & Ava
programme.desc: Ali and Ava, both lonely for different reasons, meet and sparks fly. Over a lunar month a deep connection begins to grow, despite the legacy of Ava's past relationship, and Ali's emotional turmoil at the breakdown of his marriage.

programme.title: 6 Days
programme.desc: The incredible true story of six days of terror, after six heavily-armed gunmen invade the Iranian Embassy in London in 1980 and take 26 people hostage.

programme.title: Hurricane
programme.desc: The tale of the Polish pilot who alongside his comrades of the Polish Air Force joins the British Royal Air Force to fight during the Battle of Britain. Having seen Warsaw burn, Poland crumble and France capitulate, the Poles join the Brits to push back the rampant Nazi empire.

programme.title: Comes a Bright Day
programme.desc: Love blooms in the most unusual circumstances when a bellboy and a beautiful shopgirl are taken hostage in a jewel store heist.

programme.title: Toast
programme.desc: Bittersweet story of a food writer's road to adulthood via his association with culinary tastes and smells. A delicious love letter to set to the songs of Dusty Springfield.

programme.title: Urban Hymn
programme.desc: A social worker helps a young female offender who has a remarkable voice recognize her potential.

programme.title: The Dinosaur Project
programme.desc: In this special effects thriller, a film crew in the Congo discover a lost world filled with terrifying, giant creatures thought extinct for millions of years.

programme.title: The Secret Scripture
programme.desc: Based on the best selling novel a woman committed to a mental hospital for much of her life, must rely on her diary to recount her memories to a Doctor, who is reassessing her for the move to a new facility.

programme.title: 6 Days
programme.desc: The incredible true story of six days of terror, after six heavily-armed gunmen invade the Iranian Embassy in London in 1980 and take 26 people hostage.

programme.title: Hurricane
programme.desc: The tale of the Polish pilot who alongside his comrades of the Polish Air Force joins the British Royal Air Force to fight during the Battle of Britain. Having seen Warsaw burn, Poland crumble and France capitulate, the Poles join the Brits to push back the rampant Nazi empire.

programme.title: Carlito's Way
programme.desc: A former drug kingpin Carlito Brigante is sprung from prison by his high-powered attorney. He stuns the New York underworld by vowing to go straight from a history of violence, but his plans are undermined by misguided loyalties and an outmoded code of honour. In a life-or-death battle, Carlito takes on the relentless forces that refuse to let him go.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: Special Agent Ethan Hunt teams up with the villain's ex-girlfriend to destroy an international conspiracy to sell a deadly virus to the highest bidder.

programme.title: Barb Wire
programme.desc: Baywatch babe Pamela Anderson squeezes into a fetching black leather outfit to become the fiery Barb Wire, a sassy comic book hero who fights against injustice in the United States of 2017. Barb, a bar owner/mercenary, is persuaded to help her former lover in the fight against the fascist dictatorship now in control of the country.

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October
programme.desc: A new, technologically superior Soviet nuclear sub, the Red October, is heading for the US coast under the command of Captain Marko Ramius. The American government thinks Ramius is planning to attack. A lone CIA analyst has a different idea: he thinks Ramius is planning to defect, but he has only a few hours to find him and prove it - because the entire Russian naval and air commands are trying to find him, too. The hunt is on.

programme.title: Rambo III
programme.desc: Rambo has withdrawn to a Buddhist monastery in Thailand, but his mentor, Colonel Trautman, asks him to help carry out a dangerous mission in Afghanistan. The Vietnam vet refuses. He has found peace, serenity, and is non-violent. Trautman attempts the mission alone, but is captured by the Soviets and is harshly interrogated by the cruel Colonel Zaysen. The CIA can do nothing and call upon Rambo. He needs a few moments to choose his weapons and bind his muscles before hitting his enemies like a hurricane, and in a few days he ravages the country.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: A tough Detroit cop is treading on toes in posh Beverly Hills whilst trying to track down a killer who murdered his good friend. Foley's not-quite-by-the-book way of doing things doesn't go down well with the local authorities or the bad guys. Detectives Rosewood and Taggart are ordered to follow Foley and ensure he doesn't get in any trouble, but it's Foley who shows them a thing or two about sneaky detective work.

programme.title: Coming to America
programme.desc: Join an African Prince on an unforgettable comic quest to the New World, it's time for him to find a princess... and the mission leads him and his most loyal friends to Queens, New York. In disguise as an impoverished immigrant, the pampered prince quickly finds himself a new job, new friends, new digs, new enemies and lots of trouble.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: Special Agent Ethan Hunt teams up with the villain's ex-girlfriend to destroy an international conspiracy to sell a deadly virus to the highest bidder.

programme.title: The 'Burbs
programme.desc: Suburbanite Ray Peterson's plan for a peaceful vacation is disturbed by a creepy new family on the block in this outrageous suspense-comedy directed by Joe Dante.

programme.title: Gladiator
programme.desc: Forced into slavery by the corrupt heir to the throne, Roman general Maximus becomes a gladiator. His prowess in the arena leads him to Rome, the Colosseum, and a showdown with the new emperor.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
programme.desc: After being captured by Turks during the Crusades, Robin of Locksley and a Moor, Azeem, escape back to England where Azeem vows to remain until he repays Robin for saving his life. Meanwhile, Robin's father has been murdered by the Sheriff of Nottingham and when Robin returns home he vows to avenge his father's death. Even though Marian, his childhood friend, cannot help him, he escapes to the Forest of Sherwood where he joins a band of exiled villagers and becomes their leader. With their help he attempts to cleanse the land of the evil that the Sheriff has spread.

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: The year is 1936, Indiana Jones hears from a museum curator named Marcus Brody about a biblical artefact called The Ark of the Covenant, which can hold the key to humanly existence. Joined with Marion Ravenwood and Sallah, Jones ventures to vast places such as Nepal and Egypt to find this artefact. He will have to fight his enemy Belloq and a band of Nazis for the Lost Ark.

programme.title: The Karate Kid (1984)
programme.desc: A new kid in town who is picked on by bullies learns karate and eastern philosophy from Mr Miyagi, and learns how to fight back.

programme.title: Scrooged
programme.desc: This surreal update of the Charles Dickens classic has a mean-spirited TV executive haunted into the Christmas spirit by three special time-travellers.

programme.title: The 'Burbs
programme.desc: Suburbanite Ray Peterson's plan for a peaceful vacation is disturbed by a creepy new family on the block in this outrageous suspense-comedy directed by Joe Dante.

programme.title: Gladiator

programme.title: Scrooged
programme.desc: This surreal update of the Charles Dickens classic has a mean-spirited TV executive haunted into the Christmas spirit by three special time-travellers.

programme.title: The Addams Family (1991)
programme.desc: A swindler claiming to be their long-lost Uncle Fester tries to steal a fortune from the kooky and spooky Addams family.

programme.title: Van Helsing
programme.desc: Legendary monster hunter Van Helsing must rely on the help of the beautiful and mysterious Anna Valeris as he engages in an epic battle with the ultimate forces of darkness, Dracula, the Wolf Man and Frankenstein's monster.

programme.title: The Nutty Professor
programme.desc: Dr Sherman Klump, a kind, calorically challenged genetics professor who longs to shed his 400-pound frame in order to win the heart of the beautiful Carla Purty. So, with one swig of his experimental fat-reducing serum, Sherman becomes Buddy Love, a fast-talking, pumped up, plumped-down Don Juan. Can Sherman stop his buff alter ego before it's too late, or will Buddy have the last laugh?

programme.title: The Nutty Professor II: The Klumps
programme.desc: America's funniest family back for seconds! Eddie Murphy is hilarious when he stars as the entire Klump family in this enormous comedy blockbuster. The hilarity begins when professor Sherman Klump finds romance with fellow DNA specialist, Denise Gaines, and discovers a brilliant formula that reverses ageing. But Sherman's thin and obnoxious alter ego, Buddy Love, wants out and a big piece of the action. And when Buddy gets loose, things get seriously nutty. Now, it's up to Mama, Papa, Ernie and Granny Klump to throw their weight around and save the day in this whopping, gut-busting comedy.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Animal House
programme.desc: This raunchy, screwball comedy offers a relentless spoof of 1960s college life by following the hilarious adventures of the Delta fraternity.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: After the release of Jake Blues from prison, he and brother Elwood go to visit the orphanage where they were raised by nuns. They learn that the church stopped its support and will sell the place unless the tax on the property is paid within 11 days. The brothers decide to raise the money by putting their blues band back together and staging a big gig. They may be on a 'mission from God' but they're making enemies everywhere they go.

programme.title: The Addams Family (1991)
programme.desc: A swindler claiming to be their long-lost Uncle Fester tries to steal a fortune from the kooky and spooky Addams family.

programme.title: Van Helsing

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction
programme.desc: This film begins after an epic battle left a great city torn, but with the world saved. As humanity picks up the pieces, a shadowy group reveals itself in an attempt to control the direction of history ... while an ancient, powerful new menace sets Earth in its crosshairs. With help from a new cast of humans, Optimus Prime and the Autobots rise to meet their most fearsome challenge yet. In an incredible adventure, they are swept up in a war of good and evil, ultimately leading to a climactic battle across the world.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: The thriller that scared movie fans everywhere out of the water. Three men undertake a perilous journey to hunt down a great white killer shark.

programme.title: Jaws 2
programme.desc: Just when you thought it was safe to go back in the water, another shark terrorises the resort of Amity as it recovers from the first man-eater. Police Chief Brody returns to kill.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: Two country handymen who lead a cast of zany characters to safety in this exciting sci-fi creature adventure. Just as Val McKee and Earl Basset decide to leave Perfection, Nevada, strange rumblings prevent their departure. With the help of a shapely seismology student, they discover their desolate town is infested with gigantic man-eating creatures that live below the ground. The race is on to overcome these slimy subterraneans and find a way to higher ground.

programme.title: The Devil's Own
programme.desc: Rory warms to the family but cannot forget his mission, which is to buy missiles that could change the balance of power between the Irish rebels and the British forces. O'Meara is devastated when his own family and home are threatened as Rory's plan brings the conflict into this otherwise happy home.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: After barely escaping a raging Shanghai nightclub brawl, Indy crash-lands into the wilds of India where he uncovers a sinister scheme that has enslaved a remote village's children in a fortress-like mine. Indy must save the children and avoid becoming a slave himself to the evil Thuggee cult.

programme.title: The River Wild
programme.desc: A former river guide arranges a white-water rafting trip to celebrate her son's birthday and salvage her shaky marriage. Her skills and courage are soon put to the test when three mysterious strangers threaten to turn their vacation into a living hell.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: The thrill of the hunt. It's the ultimate drug, and the more intense the rush, the higher the price. Chance, is the target of an evil mercenary who recruits homeless combat veterans for the 'amusement' of his clients, bored tycoons who will pay a half a million dollars to stalk and kill the most challenging prey of them all: Man.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: The Terminator is now one of the good guys, sent back in time to protect John Connor, the boy destined to lead the freedom fighters of the future. Sarah Connor, John's mother is the quintessential survivor who has been institutionalised for her warning of the nuclear holocaust she knows is inevitable. Together, the threesome must find a way to stop the ultimate enemy - the T-1000, the most lethal Terminator ever created. This visual tour de force is also a touching human story of survival.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious
programme.desc: On the turbo-charged streets of Los Angeles, every night is a championship race. With nitro-boosted fury, Dominic Toretto rules the road, turning all his challengers into dust. He and his rival, Johnny Tran, are the boldest, the baddest, and the best, but now there's new rage on the road. They know he's tough, they know he's fast, but what they don't know is that he's a speed demon detective with enough drive and determination to come out the winner.

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious
programme.desc: It's the nitro-fuelled answer to the question: how fast do you like it? Now an ex-cop on the run, Brian O'Connor hooks into outlaw street-racing. When the Feds strong-arm him back, O'Connor's no rules, win-or-die skills are unleashed against an international drug lord. With his velocity-addicted buddy riding shotgun, and a drop-dead-gorgeous undercover agent dialling up the heat, this film accelerates the action into a desperate race for survival, justice and mind-blowing, jaw-dropping speed.

programme.title: The River Wild
programme.desc: A former river guide arranges a white-water rafting trip to celebrate her son's birthday and salvage her shaky marriage. Her skills and courage are soon put to the test when three mysterious strangers threaten to turn their vacation into a living hell.

programme.title: Coming to America
programme.desc: Join an African Prince on an unforgettable comic quest to the New World, it's time for him to find a princess... and the mission leads him and his most loyal friends to Queens, New York. In disguise as an impoverished immigrant, the pampered prince quickly finds himself a new job, new friends, new digs, new enemies and lots of trouble.
